message:
feat(output): add resize dashboard renderer with risk-oriented diagnostics (wa-1u90p.5)

Introduce a structured resize control-plane dashboard that extracts,
diagnoses, and renders resize health telemetry from watcher IPC status
payloads.  This provides the first unified view of resize latency, hitch,
crash, and cursor-memory risk across the entire resize pipeline.

renderers.rs — new types:
- ResizeDashboardSnapshot: structured payload aggregating five resize
  telemetry sources (runtime_lock_memory, control_plane, stalled
  transactions, watchdog assessment, degradation ladder).  All fields
  are Optional/defaulted with skip_serializing_if for compact JSON.
- ResizeDashboardSnapshot::is_empty(): predicate for suppressing empty
  dashboard output when no resize telemetry is populated

renderers.rs — HealthSnapshotRenderer methods:
- resize_dashboard_from_status_payload(): extract a ResizeDashboardSnapshot
  from a raw serde_json::Value watcher status payload, probing both
  top-level keys (resize_control_plane, resize_control_plane_stalled,
  resize_control_plane_watchdog, resize_degradation_ladder) and nested
  health.runtime_lock_memory.  Returns None when all sections are empty.
- resize_dashboard_diagnostic_checks(): compute four risk-oriented
  HealthDiagnostic entries:
  - "resize latency risk": thresholds at p95 lock wait 20ms/100ms and
    stall age 2s/8s
  - "resize hitch risk": pending/capacity ratio at 50%/90% and stall
    count gates
  - "resize crash risk": watchdog severity (Warning/Critical/SafeMode)
    crossed with degradation tier (QualityReduced/CorrectnessGuarded/
    EmergencyCompatibility)
  - "resize cursor memory": p95 cursor snapshot bytes at 8MB/32MB
- render_resize_dashboard_compact(): format a human-readable block
  showing control-plane stats, watchdog state, degradation tier, lock
  telemetry p95s, stalled transaction summary, and non-Ok diagnostics
  with color-coded status labels
- decode_section<T>(): private generic helper for safe extraction of
  typed sections from JSON value with null filtering

renderers.rs — HealthDiagnosticStatus enhancements:
- Add serde::Serialize + serde::Deserialize with #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
  for machine-readable JSON payloads
- Add as_str() -> &'static str for stable lowercase labels

renderers.rs — tests (4 new):
- resize_dashboard_extracts_from_status_payload: end-to-end construction
  of a status payload with all five sections, verifying dashboard
  extraction populates all fields
- resize_dashboard_diagnostics_detect_error_risk: construct a dashboard
  with all metrics in error range, verify all four diagnostics emit Error
- resize_dashboard_compact_render_contains_risk_lines: verify compact
  renderer includes "Resize dashboard:", "watchdog:", and risk labels
- health_diagnostic_status_as_str_is_stable: assert as_str() output for
  all four variants

output/mod.rs:
- Re-export ResizeDashboardSnapshot from renderers module

search/mod.rs:
- Expand reranker re-exports: add PassthroughReranker and ScoredDoc
  alongside existing RerankError and Reranker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
